title: Verify declining the Incentive Offer and proceeding to cancel
description: Test that a user can decline the discount offer and finalize the cancellation.
preconditions: The Incentive Offer pop-up is displayed

steps.description: 1. On the offer pop-up, click the secondary 'Cancel Anyway' button.

expected_result: The offer pop-up closes, the trial is immediately cancelled, and the feedback pop-up is displayed. The 'cancel-clicked' event is fired.
